auth.login_sub: Welcome back. Please sign in to continue.
auth.register_sub: Set up your account in just a few steps.
auth.forgot_sub: We will send you a link to reset your password.
auth.role_customer_desc: I want to book appointments and services.
auth.role_vendor_desc: I offer services and use the platform for my business.
auth.password_min: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.totp_sub: Please enter the code from your authenticator app.
auth.totp_hint: Your account is protected with two-factor authentication.
auth.totp_or_backup: You can also use an 8-character backup code.
auth.forgot_sent: If an account with this email exists, we sent you a link.
auth.reset_success: Your password has been updated. You can now sign in.

customer.dashboard_sub: Here is your overview for today.

vendor.dashboard_sub: Here is your business overview for today.
vendor.setup_sub: Complete these steps to get fully started.
vendor.setup_profile_desc: Add company name, logo, address and description
vendor.setup_payments_desc: Link Stripe or PayPal to receive payments

profile.title: Profile
profile.sub: Manage your personal data and settings.
profile.password_changed: Password changed successfully. Please sign in again.

settings.title: Settings
settings.sub: Configure the platform to your needs.
settings.sub_vendor: Manage appearance, branding, domains and your plan.
settings.section_branding_sub: Logo, colors and sender identity for your booking portal.
settings.section_domains_sub: Connect your own domain (e.g. booking.example.com) to your portal.
settings.logo_url_hint: Direct link to your logo (PNG/SVG, transparent recommended).
settings.public_tagline_hint: Shown in the header of your public booking page.
settings.section_legal_sub: These details appear on imprint, privacy and terms pages of your branded booking page. Required by § 5 TMG (Germany).
settings.domain_dns_hint: Point a CNAME record of your domain to nanobooking.de. Verification will be confirmed by our support team.
settings.plan_note: Paid plans (Pro/Business) will be billed via Stripe (coming soon).
settings.feature_locked_branding: White-label branding is not included in your current plan.
settings.feature_locked_domain: Custom domains are not included in your current plan.

errors.forbidden_desc: You do not have permission to view this page.
errors.notfound_desc: The requested page does not exist.

home.hero_subtitle: Your central booking & affiliate platform for Aachen. Connect with local vendors, book services and earn with your network.
home.features_subtitle: Everything you need to build and scale your booking business in Aachen – from multi-vendor to white-label.
home.feature_1_desc: Run a full marketplace with multiple vendors. Each vendor manages their own services, pricing and availability.
home.feature_2_desc: Intelligent booking system with real-time calendar, automatic confirmations and seamless appointment management.
home.feature_3_desc: Real-time tracking & commissions. Earn through referrals and keep an eye on all conversions.
home.feature_4_desc: Integrated wallet system with payouts, transaction history and detailed financial reports.
home.feature_5_desc: Run the platform under your own brand with custom logo, colors and domain.
home.feature_6_desc: Scale your business model with franchise structures – including multi-tenant and role management.
home.how_subtitle: Your own booking portal in just three steps.
home.how_step1_desc: Create your account in minutes. Choose between Vendor, Franchiser or Affiliate Partner.
home.how_step2_desc: Set up your services, connect payment providers and customize your branding.
home.how_step3_desc: Start selling, acquire affiliate partners and scale your revenue potential.
home.cta_desc: Start your own booking portal in Aachen. No hidden costs, no long-term contracts.
home.footer_tagline: The leading booking & affiliate platform for Aachen. Powered by Nanobooking technology.

placeholders.feature_phase: This feature will roll out in a coming phase.

legal.fallback_notice: This provider has not yet supplied their own imprint data. Until then, the platform operator's data applies.

cookies.title: Cookies & privacy
cookies.body: We use technically necessary cookies for login and shopping cart. With "Accept all" you also consent to the storage of affiliate codes.

twofa.title: Two-factor authentication (2FA)
twofa.intro: Secure your account with a one-time code from an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, 1Password, …).
twofa.scan_hint: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app.
twofa.backup_warning: Save these backup codes securely (password manager / vault). They are shown only once and allow access if you lose your authenticator device. Each code is single-use.
twofa.disable_hint: Please confirm with password and a current 2FA code (or backup code).
twofa.regenerate_hint: Existing backup codes will be invalidated. Confirm with password and 2FA code.
twofa.enabled_success: 2FA enabled. Please save your backup codes.

privacy.export_desc: Download all personal data we have stored about you as a JSON file.
privacy.delete_desc: We will delete your account and all associated personal data within 14 days. You can revoke the deletion during this period.
privacy.delete_confirm_hint: Please type the word DELETE to enable the action.
privacy.deletion_scheduled: Deletion scheduled. You can revoke it before the date below.
